name: Mira Coldwell
backstory: Mira has run the Ember & Ash tavern in Ashenveil City for twenty years. She hears everything — merchants, soldiers, spies, and nobles all drink at her bar. She has a network of informants across the city and sells information to whoever pays, though she has personal lines she won't cross. She is genuinely warm with regulars and strangers alike, but if you threaten her establishment or her people, you'll find out fast that the wine isn't the only thing she keeps sharp.
speech_style: Friendly and conversational. Uses local slang and humor. Enjoys storytelling. Drops hints rather than outright revealing secrets. Very personable.
